description: The 116th Street Crew is a faction of the Genovese crime family based in East Harlem, Manhattan. Founded in the 1890s by the Morello crime family, it was originally known as the 116th Street Mob. The crew engaged in racketeering, murder, extortion, illegal gambling, loansharking, and bookmaking. It absorbed former members of the East Harlem Purple Gang in the late 1970s and early 1980s.
